source_excerpt:
User: what is the ollama model used for in convmem?
Assistant: Ollama runs locally at http://localhost:11434. It serves embeddings via nomic-embed-text (used for indexing and search vectors) and summarization via llama3.1:8b. The synthesis/distill path prefers deepseek-v4-flash through the DeepSeek API when DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is set, and falls back to the local llama3.1:8b otherwise. This keeps the system local-first with a one-line switch to the cloud model.

User: wp-login returns 404 on staging2.
Assistant: The SG Security plugin renames the login slug. The custom slug override in wh-local-dev was not applied on staging2, so /wp-login.php 404s. Fix: set the login slug in the SiteGround Security settings to match wh-local-dev, or hit the custom slug directly. Verified the redirect after updating the slug; recorded as dec_prop_20260624_025115_862b.

User: how did we implement the Thai Massage card morph on willowyhollow?
Assistant: Used the cross-document View Transition API via document.startViewTransition with a shared view-transition-name on the home card and the dedicated Thai Massage page. The crossfade uses a cubic-bezier fade-forward curve. This gives a morph between the home card and the full page. Improved perceived performance and CLS.
